name: bioresearch
description: End-to-end biomedical research automation exposed as a callable AI-native capability unit: literature review, biomarker discovery, and causal inference (Mendelian randomization). Returns a stable, structured output contract (report path, tables, figures).
status: Frozen as part of the v1.0.0 arXiv submission snapshot (release tag v1.0.0-arxiv). Canonical source: branch feat/skills-layer at commit cc5911e (this bundled copy is byte-identical on functional files). Do not modify until after the arXiv submission is cut; subsequent changes require a version bump (v1.0.1+).

router.note: Skill -> WorkflowRouter (skills/bioresearch/entry.py) -> Agent.run. The router is a thin semantic wrapper, not a new system layer; it only forwards to the existing Agent runtime and never re-implements workflow logic.

llm_binding: decoupled — Agent() defaults to llm='mock' (deterministic, no network/API key required); real LLM optional via extras_require[llm]
compatibility: Any tool-calling LLM (Claude, GPT, Cursor agent, local LLM runtimes)
